name: Jacob's Quest Anniversary Edition
short_description: Become a Legend in Jacob's Quest Anniversary Edition, a JRPG that anyone can pick up and play. Save the four crystals of the world and prevent a vile plot from unfolding. With epic battles and world progression, Jacob's Quest is the RPG of choice. Now remade from the ground up for modern gaming!
detailed_description:
Just Updated

Jacob's Quest Anniversary Edition has Full Controller Support.


About the Game

Jacob's Quest 10th Anniversary Edition is now here for all owners of the game as a free upgrade, now magically remade from the ground up for modern PCs and displays. presented with awesome effects and upscaled sprites and post-processing effects galore. With revamped content, full controller support and so much more. Join us an celebrate the ten years it took to create Jacob's Quest!

Become a Legend in Jacob's Quest Anniversary Edition, a JRPG that anyone can pick up and play. Save the four crystals of the world and prevent a vile plot from unfolding. With epic battles and world progression, Jacob's Quest is the RPG of choice, in development since 2014, and now magically remade from the ground up!

GAME FEATURES

  • A huge elemental world to explore, with dungeons, puzzles and bosses to fight

  • Hand drawn sprites and excellent post-processing effects to modernise it's presentation

  • A addictive soundtrack that immerses you in Jacob's World, featuring electric guitar segways

  • Traditional JRPG gameplay with action elements- jump, hookshot and block puzzles are a plenty.

TURN BASED BATTLES

In classic 90's fashion, battle your way through challenging battles and bosses with turn based gameplay with a huge spell and abilities roster

COMPELLING GAMEPLAY

This is JRPG at it's finest, with memorable characters, allies and bosses, 90's JRPG lovers must have this game!

STEAM DECK COMPATIBILITY

Jacob's Quest is tested by Valve as Playable for Steam Deck.
